login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back
login.phoneHelp: We will send a one-time code by SMS.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start with your mobile number — no password needed.
signup.phoneHelp: We will text you a code to verify your number.

errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Zambian mobile number
errors.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.wrongCode: That code is incorrect. Try again.
errors.expired: This code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.throttled: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.sendFailed: We could not send a code. Please try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email — check your inbox for the verification link.
errors.alreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.

welcome.title: Welcome to Vergeo5
welcome.subtitle: Pick your language and what you want to explore first.
welcome.interestsHelp: Choose one or more — we'll personalize your home feed.
welcome.error: We could not save your preferences. Please try again.

reset.requestSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
reset.requestSent: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
reset.confirmSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.confirmSuccess: Password updated. You can now sign in.
reset.linkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
